goal: is_monotone[A, B](f) = forall(x0: A, x1: A) { x0 <= x1 implies f(x0) <= f(x1) }
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 <= x2 or x0(x1) <= x0(x2) } = is_monotone[T0, T1](x0) }[A, B](f)
x <= y
is_monotone[A, B](f)
(forall(x0: A, x1: A) { not x0 <= x1 or f(x0) <= f(x1) } = true)
function(x0: A) { forall(x1: A) { not x0 <= x1 or f(x0) <= f(x1) } = true }(x)
function(x0: A, x1: A) { not (x0 <= x1 and not f(x0) <= f(x1)) }(x, y)

goal: is_antitone[A, B](f) = forall(x0: A, x1: A) { x0 <= x1 implies f(x1) <= f(x0) }
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 <= x2 or x0(x2) <= x0(x1) } = is_antitone[T0, T1](x0) }[A, B](f)
x <= y
is_antitone[A, B](f)
(forall(x0: A, x1: A) { not x0 <= x1 or f(x1) <= f(x0) } = true)
function(x0: A) { forall(x1: A) { not x0 <= x1 or f(x1) <= f(x0) } = true }(x)
function(x0: A, x1: A) { not (x0 <= x1 and not f(x1) <= f(x0)) }(x, y)

goal: is_strict_monotone[A, B](f) = forall(x0: A, x1: A) { x0 < x1 implies f(x0) < f(x1) }
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 < x2 or x0(x1) < x0(x2) } = is_strict_monotone[T0, T1](x0) }[A, B](f)
x < y
is_strict_monotone[A, B](f)
(forall(x0: A, x1: A) { not x0 < x1 or f(x0) < f(x1) } = true)
function(x0: A) { forall(x1: A) { not x0 < x1 or f(x0) < f(x1) } = true }(x)
function(x0: A, x1: A) { not (x0 < x1 and not f(x0) < f(x1)) }(x, y)

goal: is_strict_antitone[A, B](f) = forall(x0: A, x1: A) { x0 < x1 implies f(x1) < f(x0) }
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 < x2 or x0(x2) < x0(x1) } = is_strict_antitone[T0, T1](x0) }[A, B](f)
x < y
is_strict_antitone[A, B](f)
(forall(x0: A, x1: A) { not x0 < x1 or f(x1) < f(x0) } = true)
function(x0: A) { forall(x1: A) { not x0 < x1 or f(x1) < f(x0) } = true }(x)
function(x0: A, x1: A) { not (x0 < x1 and not f(x1) < f(x0)) }(x, y)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[A](left)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[A](right)
not left <= identity_fn(right)
left <= identity_fn(right)
function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 <= x2 or x0(x1) <= x0(x2) } = is_monotone[T0, T1](x0) }[A, A](identity_fn[A])
let w0: A satisfy { exists(k0: A) { w0 <= k0 and not identity_fn(w0) <= identity_fn(k0) } }
let w1: A satisfy { w0 <= w1 and not identity_fn(w0) <= identity_fn(w1) }
let w2: A satisfy { w0 <= w2 and not identity_fn(w0) <= identity_fn(w2) }
function(x0: A, x1: A) { not x0 <= x1 or identity_fn(x0) <= identity_fn(x1) }(w0, w2)
not identity_fn(w0) <= identity_fn(w2)
identity_fn(w0) <= identity_fn(w2)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[A](left)
function[T0](x0: T0) { identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[A](right)
not left < identity_fn(right)
left < identity_fn(right)
function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 < x2 or x0(x1) < x0(x2) } = is_strict_monotone[T0, T1](x0) }[A, A](identity_fn[A])
let w0: A satisfy { exists(k0: A) { w0 < k0 and not identity_fn(w0) < identity_fn(k0) } }
let w1: A satisfy { w0 < w1 and not identity_fn(w0) < identity_fn(w1) }
let w2: A satisfy { w0 < w2 and not identity_fn(w0) < identity_fn(w2) }
function(x0: A, x1: A) { not x0 < x1 or identity_fn(x0) < identity_fn(x1) }(w0, w2)
w0 < w2
not identity_fn(w0) < identity_fn(w2)
identity_fn(w0) < identity_fn(w2)
